introSection: Python Pit is an E&F Miler steel kiddie roller coaster located at Fast Lane Entertainment in Lowell, Arkansas, USA. It originally operated at Zonkers in Olathe, Kansas, USA from 1997 to August 2, 2015.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The coaster opened in 1997 at Jeepers! in Olathe, Kansas.

fullText:
Python Pit is an E&F Miler steel kiddie roller coaster located at Fast Lane Entertainment in Lowell, Arkansas, USA. It originally operated at Zonkers in Olathe, Kansas, USA from 1997 to August 2, 2015.

The coaster opened in 1997 at Jeepers! in Olathe, Kansas.
